if (!regex) {
  const segment = separator === '/' ? '[^/]*' : '[^.]*'
  const char = separator === '/' ? '[^/]' : '[^.]'
  const regexPattern = pattern
    .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')
    .replace(/\*\*/g, '{{GLOBSTAR}}')
    .replace(/\*/g, segment)
    .replace(/{{GLOBSTAR}}/g, '.*')
    .replace(/\?/g, char)
  regex = new RegExp(`^${regexPattern}$`)
  patternCache.set(cacheKey, regex)
}
